input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.9.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.9.2
            TITLE: if a team genuinely makes a part listed on the table as a bought part, they may alternatively

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.9.2: If a team genuinely Makes a part listed on the table as a Bought part, they may alternatively
S.3.9.2 If a team genuinely Makes a part listed on the table as a Bought part, they may alternatively 
cost it as a Made part only if a place holder entry is listed in the tables enabling them to do so.

final_answer: S.3.9.2 If a team genuinely Makes a part listed on the table as a Bought part, they may alternatively cost it as a Made part only if a place holder entry is listed in the tables enabling them to do so.
